title: Unlocked
tmdbOverview: A woman's life is turned upside-down when a dangerous man gets a hold of her lost cell phone and uses it to track her every move.
synopsis: Unlocked (2023) is a thriller, crime and mystery film from South Korea. It carries a 6.4 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
